source_basis.note: Git integration creates preview deployments for pull requests and production deployments from the production branch.
Environment variable changes apply only to new deployments and can be scoped to production, preview, custom, or development environments.
Preview deployments are pre-production; custom staging environments are plan-dependent and require project/admin setup.
Variable changes are staged changes that must be reviewed and deployed to apply.
Configured healthchecks wait for HTTP 200 before switching traffic to a new deployment.
Public web services should listen on 0.0.0.0 and the Railway-provided PORT variable.
Railway detects a root Dockerfile by default or can use RAILWAY_DOCKERFILE_PATH for a custom path.
Supabase CLI supports local development, migrations, db push, project management, and type generation; no CLI action is run in this task.
Exposed Data API tables and views need RLS; functions need restricted EXECUTE grants and SECURITY DEFINER review.
RLS plus Supabase Auth is the staging data-isolation gate for tenant-owned data.
Supabase Postgres/Auth/RLS is selected by TASK-122 as the external staging source of truth for structured membership and tenant data.
Railway volumes provide persistent service files, but TASK-122 does not select them as tenant source of truth.
KIS provider guidance makes third-party service, market-data agreement, and order API regulatory process review a launch blocker.
Affiliate user terms assume an approved company/institution path and do not clear Autofolio paid hosted member use.

repo_state_findings.evidence: .env.example and MEMBERSHIP-STAGING-ENV-INVENTORY now exist with sanitized placeholders only; external platform env vars are still not written.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Owner/R3 must write reviewed values in Vercel/Railway/Supabase outside the repository and keep real secrets out of git.

repo_state_findings.evidence: Root Dockerfile now starts uvicorn with ${PORT:-8000}; /api/health readiness is recorded in MEMBERSHIP-RAILWAY-BACKEND-READINESS.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Owner/R3 must still configure and execute Railway staging deploy outside this repository.

repo_state_findings.evidence: MEMBERSHIP-SUPABASE-STAGING-MIGRATION-RLS-REVIEW records table groups, owner fields, RLS review requirements, Data API review order, and cross-user tests; no migration file or apply exists.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Owner/R3 must create and apply a staging-only Supabase migration, run advisors/cross-user tests, and capture apply evidence.

repo_state_findings.evidence: MEMBERSHIP-STAGING-PERSISTENT-STORAGE-DECISION selects Supabase Postgres/Auth/RLS as external staging source of truth; local vault/SQLite/Railway volume remain internal-smoke or non-tenant only.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Owner/R3 must select/create Supabase staging, review/apply migration and RLS, run advisors/cross-user tests, and review backup/restore before external users.

repo_state_findings.evidence: MEMBERSHIP-KIS-COMMERCIAL-TERMS-REVIEW-PACKET records official KIS provider/terms risks and Owner/KIS/legal question set; no KIS/legal clearance exists.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Keep KIS_ENV=mock and do not activate KIS credentials, market-data display, order API support, or paid KIS integration claims until Owner/KIS/legal confirmation exists.

repo_state_findings.evidence: TASK-117 and secret-store plans forbid bank/PG/Open Banking setup and real payment records.
repo_state_findings.required_before_deploy: Use non-real payment placeholders for staging until Owner approval.

environment_inventory_placeholders.note: Record placeholder only; actual staging URL is Owner/external-platform state.
Must point to the approved staging backend before build; do not commit live URLs in source artifacts.
Cookie security behavior depends on this setting; external HTTPS staging must review secure-cookie behavior.
Paper/prod KIS activation is outside this preflight task.
Local vault/runtime path is not a production tenant store; persistence strategy remains blocked.
Real receiving account information is Owner-only and not allowed in repo.
Actual keys are forbidden in repo and require Supabase staging approval before use.

required_staging_smoke_plan.expected: /login loads without console errors and does not expose guest demo CTA
GET /api/health returns 200 and JSON status ok through the frontend origin
Public signup can create/request status only in staging-safe mode and cannot create active account or session
guest demo and unknown local auto-register are disabled by staging env
can_launch remains false until Supabase/RLS, secrets, payment, engine, KIS terms, and deploy evidence pass
KIS_ENV is mock, no KIS credentials are configured, no order endpoint is enabled, and no live order path is touched
No secret, bank account, raw payment evidence, provider token, or customer PII appears in logs or responses
External/member staging uses Supabase Postgres/Auth/RLS after Owner/R3 apply; local vault, SQLite, Railway volume, and runtime files are not tenant sources of truth

rollback_plan.rule: Use preview/custom staging only; do not promote to production.
Configure /api/health healthcheck before actual Railway deploy; failed healthcheck must prevent traffic switch.
Supabase staging migration must have down/rollback notes and a restore point before apply.
Any future platform variable change must have a recorded previous-value owner-held backup outside repo.
KIS_ENV stays mock and trading automation stays blocked during staging smoke.

forbidden_actions: Do not deploy to Vercel, Railway, Supabase, or any public URL in this task.
Do not create, mutate, or link external platform projects.
Do not add or edit environment variables in any external platform.
Do not create or apply Supabase migrations.
Do not write .github workflow changes for this task.
Do not read, write, rotate, or validate secrets.
Do not configure real KIS, bank, PG, Open Banking, or payment values.
